effects.name: Tsintao
effects.effect: Cannot be Charged. Super Evolves from Tsintao. Your Opponent gets KO 2 Points if defeated. You can only play 1 Super Evolve Vivosaur card in your Deck.

effects.name: Life of the Party
effects.effect: Each time this Vivosaur swaps Vivosaur Zones: place a Party counter on this Vivosaur. During your Action Phase, if this Vivosaur does not have a Status applied to this Vivosaur: you can remove 1 Party Counter from this Vivosaur; reveal 1 card in your Deck and add it to your Hand, then Apply Excite to this Vivosaur.

effects.name: Bulgon bash
effects.effect: Remove all statuses applied to your Vivosaurs.

effects.name: Bulgon Blast
effects.effect: Flip a coin, if heads: swap this Vivosaur's Vivosaur Zone and use this Attack Skill again without exerting FP. Repeat this until you flip tails.
